items.project_definition: Attributes used to enhance accessibility for assistive technologies within the interface components.
A specific visual component rendered when no data records are available to display in the main list.
A client-side input interface used to capture and validate new financial transaction data.
A display component that renders financial records sorted by most recent first with a maximum initial threshold of 50 entries.
The browser-based key-value storage mechanism used as the persistence layer for the application data.
The set of frontend components and styles that constitute the visual and interactive layer of the application.
